description: Curated external plugin marketplaces endorsed by Roxabi. Source of truth: .claude-plugin/external-registry.json (curated_marketplaces array) — this file mirrors it for Claude Code runtime discovery. Install via: claude plugin marketplace add <source>.

marketplaces.name: agent-browser
marketplaces.description: Headless browser automation CLI for AI agents — navigate, click, fill, screenshot, scrape.

marketplaces.name: roxabi-vault
marketplaces.description: Persistent memory for agents — SQLite+FTS5 knowledge base with CLI, library, and 7 vault skills.

marketplaces.name: claude-plugins-official
marketplaces.description: Official Anthropic plugin marketplace — 83 plugins including LSPs, integrations, and workflow skills.

marketplaces.name: knowledge-work-plugins
marketplaces.description: Official Anthropic knowledge-work plugins — design, legal, marketing, product-management, sales.

marketplaces.name: context7-marketplace
marketplaces.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server — version-specific documentation lookup from source repos.

marketplaces.name: visual-explainer
marketplaces.description: Self-contained HTML pages with diagrams, visualizations, data tables, and slide decks.

marketplaces.name: ui-ux-pro-max-skill
marketplaces.description: UI/UX design intelligence — 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 13 stack guidelines.

marketplaces.name: roxabi-forge
marketplaces.description: Forge — HTML visual artifacts (diagrams, galleries, guides, epics). Brand-aware, manifest-indexed, Cloudflare Pages ready.

marketplaces.name: roxabi-video-engine
marketplaces.description: Programmatic video generation — 55 React components, 13 kits, headless MP4 rendering.
